bind-pdf-form-autofiller.title: Bind PDF Form to AutoFiller
bind-pdf-form-autofiller.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF form to an AutoFiller instance using a file path.

xlsx-to-datatable-pdf.title: Create DataTable from XLSX and Import into PDF Table
xlsx-to-datatable-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to read an Excel worksheet, use the first row as column headers to build a DataTable, and import it into an Aspose.Pdf table for form mapping.

import-datatable-autofiller.title: Import DataTable into AutoFiller for PDF Form Filling
import-datatable-autofiller.description: Shows how to populate a DataTable and import it into Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to fill matching AcroForm fields in a PDF template.

save-filled-pdf.title: Save Filled PDF While Preserving Layout
save-filled-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a text fragment, and saves the document to a new file without altering the original layout.

verify-pdf-pages-per-datarow.title: Verify PDF Pages Match DataTable Rows
verify-pdf-pages-per-datarow.description: Creates a PDF where each DataTable row is placed on its own page and checks that the page count matches the number of rows.

map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-fields.title: Map DataTable Columns to PDF Form Fields with AutoFiller
map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-fields.description: Demonstrates renaming DataTable columns to match PDF form field identifiers before using AutoFiller to fill the PDF.

fill-pdf-form-data-table.title: Fill PDF Form Using DataTable with Custom Columns
fill-pdf-form-data-table.description: Demonstrates adding custom columns to a DataTable, populating it, and using AutoFiller to import the data into a PDF form.

process-multiple-excel-worksheets-by-cre.title: Process Multiple Excel Worksheets By Creating Separate Datatable Instances And Invoking Autofiller For Each

autofiller-fill-form.title: Fill PDF Form Fields with AutoFiller and Handle Errors
autofiller-fill-form.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to fill form fields while handling missing fields and file‑related exceptions.

fill-pdf-with-autofiller.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller and Dispose Resources
fill-pdf-with-autofiller.description: Demonstrates how to bind a template PDF, import data, save the filled document, and properly dispose the AutoFiller object.

batch-fill-pdf-template.title: Batch Fill PDF Template with Multiple DataTables
batch-fill-pdf-template.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to fill a PDF form template with several DataTable data sets, producing separate output files for each set.

load-the-source-pdf-from-a-memory-stream.title: Load The Source Pdf From A Memory Stream And Fill It Using Autofiller Without Writing Intermediate Files

excel-to-pdf-table.title: Export Excel Worksheet to DataTable, Filter and Import into PDF Table
excel-to-pdf-table.description: Loads an XLSX worksheet into a DataTable, filters rows, and imports the result into a PDF table.

generate-pdfs-custom-filename.title: Generate PDFs with Custom File Names from DataTable
generate-pdfs-custom-filename.description: Creates a PDF for each DataTable row, fills form fields, and saves the file using a column value as the file name.

log-datatable-rows-to-pdf.title: Log DataTable Row Processing and Page Creation in PDF
log-datatable-rows-to-pdf.description: Creates a PDF where each DataTable row is placed on a separate page and logs the processed row number along with the page number.

protect-pdf-with-password.title: Protect a PDF with Password Using PdfFileSecurity
protect-pdf-with-password.description: Creates a simple PDF, saves it, then applies user and owner passwords to protect the document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

merge-multiple-filled-pdf-documents-gene.title: Merge Multiple Filled Pdf Documents Generated From Separate Datatables Into A Single Consolidated Pdf File

pdf-to-byte-array.title: Convert Filled PDF to Byte Array for Web API
pdf-to-byte-array.description: Loads a filled PDF file and converts it to a byte array using a memory stream, suitable for transmitting over a web API without writing to disk.

async-read-xlsx-write-pdf.title: Asynchronously Read XLSX and Write Filled PDF
async-read-xlsx-write-pdf.description: Demonstrates reading an XLSX file asynchronously, creating a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, and writing the PDF asynchronously to improve performance.

autofiller-retry-import.title: Retry Mechanism for AutoFiller Import with Transient File Access Handling
autofiller-retry-import.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.AutoFiller with a retry loop to handle transient I/O exceptions when binding a template PDF and importing data.

pdf-page-datatable-summary.title: Generate Summary Report of PDF Pages and DataTable Row IDs
pdf-page-datatable-summary.description: Extracts tables from each PDF page using TableAbsorber and maps each table row to a DataTable identifier, printing a concise summary report.

excel-to-pdf-mapper.title: Map Excel Columns to PDF Form Fields Using a Configuration File
excel-to-pdf-mapper.description: Demonstrates loading a column-to-field mapping from a text file, reading data from an Excel workbook, and filling a PDF form for each row using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

autofiller-excel-streaming.title: Stream Excel Data into AutoFiller for Large PDFs
autofiller-excel-streaming.description: Shows how to read a large XLSX file into a DataTable and feed it to Aspose.Pdf.AutoFiller to generate a merged PDF without exhausting memory.

fill-pdf-validate-size.title: Fill PDF Template from DataTable and Validate File Size
fill-pdf-validate-size.description: Demonstrates filling a PDF template with DataTable rows using AutoFiller and checking that the resulting PDF does not exceed a predefined size limit.

fill-pdf-from-xlsx.title: Fill PDF Template from Uploaded XLSX Using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-from-xlsx.description: Demonstrates an ASP.NET Core controller that accepts an XLSX file, converts it to a DataTable, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate a PDF template and return the filled PDF.

fill-pdf-form-with-cancellation.title: Fill PDF Form with Timeout Cancellation
fill-pdf-form-with-cancellation.description: Demonstrates using a CancellationTokenSource to abort a long-running PDF form-filling operation when a timeout is exceeded.

pdf-to-excel-temp-folder.title: Convert PDF to Excel Using a Temporary Folder for Large Datasets
pdf-to-excel-temp-folder.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to Excel while using a temporary folder for intermediate files to avoid disk‑space issues with large datasets.

populate-pdf-form-fields-numeric-format.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from DataTable with Numeric Formatting
populate-pdf-form-fields-numeric-format.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF template, formatting numeric values in a DataTable, and filling the template's form fields using AutoFiller.

split-pdf-single-pages.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files
split-pdf-single-pages.description: Shows how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

fill-pdf-form-from-excel.title: Fill PDF Form from Excel Data
fill-pdf-form-from-excel.description: Loads an existing PDF form and an Excel spreadsheet, copies field names and values from the sheet, fills the PDF form, and saves the result.
